properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 63/16

NORWEGIAN SEA
1. NAVAL SURFACE, SUBSURFACE AND AIR UNITS FROM NORWAY AND NATO NATIONS WILL BE CONDUCTING 
 NAVAL EXERCISES WITHIN AREA BOUND BY: 
A. 6300N-00500W 
B. 6500N-00500W
C. 6730N-00130E 
D. 6730N-01000E
E. 6300N-01000E 
TIMEFRAM FOR EXERCISES 22 JUNE 1200Z TO 30 JUN. 
2. QUESTIONS REGARDING EXERCISE DYNAMIC MONGOOSE 2016 WILL BE ANSWERED BY NATO MARITIME COMMAND (MARCOM) AT
NORTHWOOD UK, TEL 44 1923 956710, E-MAIL: BWC(AT)MC.NATO.INT.
3. UNITS CONDUCTING UNDERWATER ACTIVITY WITHIN AREA NOTED ABOVE ARE REQUESTED TO MAKE CONTACT WITH HQ MARCOM
IN ORDER TO DE-CONFLICT AND MAINTAIN SAFETY AT ALL TIMES.
